description: Designed graphic card on a plain white background, text-only with no photos, people, or seals. At the top center is a small red rectangular label with white uppercase text reading 'COAST GUARD'. Below it, in large bold black display type, is the headline: 'DOGE helps Coast Guard save nearly $33M by eliminating ineffective IT program' (with 'ineffective IT program' set off in single quotes). Beneath the headline, in smaller gray text, is a sub-line: 'Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem praised the move in a statement to Fox News Digital, calling it Another win for government efficiency at DHS!'
notable_text: COAST GUARD; DOGE helps Coast Guard save nearly $33M by eliminating 'ineffective IT program'; 'Another win for government efficiency at DHS!'
